programs.title: Nhk Newsline
programs.desc: . NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programs.title: Somewhere Street A Short Stroll
programs.desc: . A 15-minute spin-off of the "Somewhere Street" series, "A Short Stroll" explores cities around the world. This time we visit Faro, the southernmost city in Portugal.

programs.title: Core Kyoto
programs.desc: years ago used cloth dyed with the colors of prayer, many of which are lost to time. Some today are fascinated with these forgotten colors and are attempting to revive them. Gary Tegler, Takuji Takahashi, Ikuko Takeda, Sumie Nagakusa, Tomoko Eri, Toshiaki Nagakusa, Kokei Eri, Yoshiaki Dobuchi.

programs.title: Nhk Newsline
programs.desc: . NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programs.title: Cinematic Journey
programs.desc: . Actor Kyle Card hikes the San'in Kaigan Geopark trail. He traces the Earth's memory through Uradome's jagged coast, Tottori's dunes and Genbudo's hexagonal columns.

programs.title: Japanology Plus
programs.desc: . Sashiko is a type of traditional Japanese embroidery, once vital for the durability and warmth of clothes in cold climates. We explore how the charm of this enduring craft is being rediscovered. Peter Barakan, Kanako Sachno, Mamoru Abe, Hitoshi Nishiyama, Hirotaka Ohata, Sachiko Miyamoto, Kimiko Fukuda, Chiyo Kawahara.
